THE SECOND TUMMY TIRAMISU||3262 MIDLAND.matchedAddress: 3262 Midland Ave E111, Scarborough, ON M1V 0C4, Canada
reviews:
Just stumbled into this shop one night and tried their osmanthus rice wine tiramisu and what a delicious creation! It's so light and airy. Overall well balanced in flavour and their house made ladyfingers offer a nice texture.

They don't use any cream! Mainly mascarpone and egg for the cream. I'm not sure how they get the cream so airy, maybe nitro whip? Because there isn't a stabilizer, you really need to keep it refrigerated or eat it right after purchase. It seems okay to take it home (about 30+mins drive for me) now since the weather is still somewhat cold/cool. Not sure how it will hold

Tried the Second Tummy Tiramisu over the holidays after attempting to make our own tiramisu and wanting to compare.
Nice location. Friendly staff. I arrived closer to end of day so only a few selections left. On screen a lot of varieties available. I tried the strawberry tiramisu. The server packaged it nicely for take out and indicates no stabilizers are used for the cream so it’s best to eat the same day. I also purchased an eclair. I ate the tiramisu about 2 hours later and had refrigerated as indicated. The cream unfortunately had deflated a bit which I know was due to no stabilizers. My o

Very adorable dessert shop :) the owner was very kind. I would like to give some feedback on the actual tiramisù which would be the texture of the cream. It was a bit too soft and the lady fingers seemed to be have soaked in a lot of espresso, which gave a bit of a soggy consistency though out. Worth a try though 🤗. Hope they can continue to make their tiramisu better and better 🩷🙏

Best Strawberry Matcha Tiramisu! Just a heads up for first timers they make these fresh without any gelatin or cream so the consistency is very soft and delicate.

The staff advises us to eat it immediately to enjoy the perfect texture.

Its def a high-end, airy dessert that melts in our mouth. I always appreciate high-quality ingredients❤️

Only have tried their Classic Tiramisu and Strawberry ones but I will definitely come back for more💕😍

Definitely worth the visit! The products are clearly made with care and love. What I appreciated most was the perfect balance of sweetness—just right, not overly sweet, and tasting natural from the ingredients themselves. I tried the matcha and pistachio, and both were excellent. I’ll definitely be ordering them again. Keep it up!

CRAB CEYLON||1080 TAPSCOTT RD, #23 M1X 1.matchedAddress: 1080 Tapscott Rd #23, Scarborough, ON M1X 1E7, Canada
reviews:
Ordered several dishes from here for a birthday takeaway meal for 7 people. Crab curry with roast pan was delicious. Devil shrimp was delicious. It tastes as good as my mother in law's (don't tell her I said that). To me that means it's cooked with care and ingredients are fresh.  I loved the fish rolls. We like spicy food and found the spice level to be good with a healthy zing. Quality of the crab is good, and tastes like how it does when we make it at home.

Will definitely order from here again.

Highly rated. They have some of the freshest Kothu roti and fried rice I’ve ever tried anywhere. The owner is so nice and you can see how passionate he is about his craft and his culture. Their lunch special prices cannot be beat. I’ll continue going here. I recommended to anyone!

I absolutely loved the crab kothu roti here. It’s honestly one of the best I’ve ever had. The portion size is very generous, and they do not skimp on the crab or any other meat. There’s so much meat in every bite, and it’s packed with bold, flavorful spice without being overwhelming.

You can tell it’s made fresh and with care.  I would highly recommend it and will definitely be coming back.

Tried Crab Ceylon for the first time and it was amazing! I got the crab curry with roast paan and the spicy garlic mussels — everything was full of flavour and super satisfying. The crab curry was rich and spicy, and the roast paan was perfect for dipping. The mussels were spicy and yummy with a unique burst of flavours.
Love supporting small local businesses like this — definitely coming back ☺️
Tried the special kothu with crab 🦀, chicken and shrimp. Was soo good. It did cost 30$ but this was real crab meat and you can taste the quality. The portion was also enough for 2 to 3 people.

EGE MARKET||2319 KEELE ST M6M 4A1.matchedAddress: 2319 Keele St Suite 102, North York, ON M6M 4A1, Canada
reviews: Wonderful local Turkish grocery store! The selection is great with multiple Turkish sweets, delicious baked potatoes, high quality tea & coffee, and lots of authentic Turkish snacks you can’t easily find elsewhere. The staff are always friendly and helpful, and the store feels welcoming every time I visit. Highly recommend supporting this gem in the neighborhood. ⭐️⭐️⭐️
A very clean and respectable Turkish market. I definitely recommend it. You're very likely to find almost any product you're looking for in Türkiye here.

This place is an absolute gem! The entire spot is incredibly clean and well-kept, which makes the experience even better. The staff are extremely friendly, welcoming, and genuinely helpful from the moment you walk in. You can really feel the positive atmosphere and great service. Highly recommended!

We tried their Sucuklu Tost and Kavurmalı Tost, both were amazing. The prices of the products are quite reasonable/cheaper than many Turkish groceries. Owner’s genuine attitude and communication skills are something I’m looking for in a small business. Overall great experience 👌🏻

it's clean and has a lot of stuffs ,
stuffed potato and cold sandwich was perfect!!

reviews: I really enjoy shopping at Ayasofya SuperMarket! The product selection is truly wide — especially the fresh halal meats and Turkish & Mediterranean products, which are excellent. The staff are very helpful, and the store is always clean and well organized. Prices are also very reasonable for the quality. I will definitely be coming back!

The butcher department at Ayasofya Supermarket is outstanding. The meat is always fresh, high quality, 100% halal and well-prepared. The butchers are knowledgeable, friendly, and happy to cut or prepare meat exactly the way you want. Everything is clean and well-organized, and you can really tell they care about quality and hygiene. Excellent service and great value — easily one of the best butcher departments around. Highly recommended.

I'm even a home cook and I buy ally product from Ayasofya.

I recently visited this Turkish market and had a great experience. The store is clean, well-organized, and offers a wide variety of fresh and authentic Turkish products. Everything feels welcoming and high quality.

I especially want to mention Ece, who works there. She is very friendly, helpful, and professional. She made my shopping experience much better with her positive attitude and excellent customer service. Employees like Ece truly make a difference.

I highly recommend this market to anyone looking for authentic Turkish food and a warm atmosphere.

Congratulations on your new store! We are excitedly looking forward to the opening. I’m sure your delicious pastry products and high-quality meat selections will quickly become favorites. Wishing you abundant success and prosperity.”

The Best Turkish Market Experience in Toronto!

Ayasofya Supermarket is truly one of the best and most authentic Turkish markets you can find in Toronto.

The butcher section offers incredibly fresh and high-quality meats — especially beef and lamb, which are tender and perfectly prepared.

The chicken doner sandwich is a must-try; it tastes just like the authentic doner you find in Turkey, fresh and full of flavor.

The produce section is equally impressive! All fruits and vegetables are carefully selected, clean, and fresh, with nothing spoiled or disorganized.

The store environment is spot

reviews: Pam’s roti has been one of my favourite spots for pickup/delivery for years. The food is always flavourful, fresh and satisfying. The service is incredibly friendly and thoughtful! This place is a community gem! ❤️

I want to believe that this is a fluke because Pam's appears to be well-loved, but the vegetarian roti severely disappointed me for $18 tax-in. Very little filling and too much roti folded on itself. I had to get close to the center of the roti to get bites that weren't 75%+ bread. Filling was also way drier and not as flavorful as I would have liked. Might have better luck with meat options.
We had ordered a catering for 15 people. It was wonderful especially the chicken curry. They delivered it on time. The roti was soft and freshly made. Thank you Pam's roti.

Follow @bredgyeats for more food posts!

Goat Curry Roti - This is what I would imagine a delicious, soul-warming home-cooked dish would taste like from a Jamaican household. Wrapped cozily inside a dhalpuri roti is a savoury, comforting curry spiced wonderfully with potatoes that soak up and lock in that flavour and some tender lamb chunks that have a distinct but pleasant lamby flavour that I adore.

My partner and I love Pam's! We moved away from this area but we still come back for Pam's.

Our favourite order is a curry chicken roti and a curry goat roti, and doubles on the side. They are very reasonably priced and the doubles are a great cheap snack.

When you receive the roti it is hot and never soggy, even if you have it delivered. They put a layer of chickpea between the roti and curry fillings and it keeps the moisture from penetrating the bread and also tastes delicious. The portions are good, the filling to bread ratio is perfect, and the taste is rich and delicious.

The doubles

Authentic Caribbean Flavors with a Homestyle Touch

I recently visited Lezma’s Kitchen and was really impressed! The food tastes truly authentic—just like a home-cooked Jamaican meal. The jerk pork and jerk chicken was packed with flavor and cooked perfectly.

reviews: This is probably the ONLY place in Toronto that stands true to its claim “Authentic Donne Biriyani”!! I got a take away and kid me not, the cauliflower florets were so crisp and soft!! The donne biriyani rice couldn’t get any more authentic, the softness the flavour. I got that for dinner but couldn’t help devour them at 5 30pm!! Never to miss the pricing for the quantity and the quality of the food!! Hands down the BEST!! 🙌🏻🙌🏻

We recently tried the dum spot in food alley on Queen st in Toronto and we were so happily amazed to find this gem. They are the only restaurant in Toronto serving authentic Donne biryani and Parotta curry combo. Their lamb meat balls and ghee rice were also amazing. They also had few combos on their menu. Totally worth the buck - reasonablly priced and amazing flavours. Straight from Bangalore.

Got the Ambur & Donne Biryani. Both very distinct & very different flavor profiles.

The red one being the Donne Biryani & the Green one being the Ambur Biryani. Not oily. I found them to be a tad bit dry, even though I got them fresh as soon as they opened the store.

The Donne Biryani was flavourful with good heat coming from reg chill & whole spices.

The Ambur Biryani was herby with mint & coriander being flavor profile.

Sweet people running the store.

The Dum Spot really surprised me- in the best way. The rice was super flavorful, spiced just right- not too spicy, but still packed with that rich masala taste.
And the fried chicken kababs? So good! Crispy, juicy, and gave total Bangalore street food vibes. Took me right back.
If you’re missing proper South Indian-style biryani in Toronto, you’ve gotta try this place. Will definitely be going back!

I tried the Bangalore fried chicken (Called Kebab in the streets of Bangalore) for the first time here along with a friend who is a Bangalorian, and we both really enjoyed the fried chicken. It is super juicy, very well seasoned and crispy.

We tried them when we picked them up at the location but one thing to note, by the time it gets delivered it might get soggy so I popped mine in the air fryer for a bit and it was crispy and hot just like at the store location.

They also do not have a dine in option in the winter from what I could tell, but do give it a try if you are considering ordering

BERGAMOS BY BRY FOODS||806 COLLEGE ST M6.matchedAddress: 806 College St, Toronto, ON M6G 1C8, Canada
reviews:
I’ve tried several products from BRY Foods and they honestly exceeded my expectations. The All Purpose and Everything Bagel seasonings are super fresh and add amazing flavour to almost anything. The Stuffed Spice and Greek Seasoning bring such a nice aroma to dishes — you can really taste the quality.

The double-roasted chickpeas are incredibly crunchy and addictive, and the Isot (Urfa) Pepper has that perfect smoky kick I love. Even the cinnamon sticks smell unbelievably fresh the moment you open the jar.

Everything I tried was top quality, clean, and clearly made with care. I tried it, lov

I love shopping and supporting local. This quality product shop has definitely impressed me.  The dried orange slices add an elegant touch to teas and tabletop decor when hosting.  I also enjoyed the rose, lemon and apple flavored Turkish delights. I am now eager to try their olive oil.

Really impressed with BRY Foods. I tried a few of their products and everything was fresh, flavourful, and great quality. The dried fruits, nuts, and Turkish delights were all excellent, and their spices have a really authentic taste.

Packaging was neat, delivery was quick, and you can tell they put care into what they sell.
I tried it, loved it, and definitely recommend giving them a shot. I’ll be ordering again for sure.

I recently tried several products from BRY Bergamosa / BRY Foods, and I’m genuinely impressed with the quality. Everything tastes fresh, natural, and well-packaged. The double-roasted chickpeas are perfectly crunchy, the sun-dried Turkish apricots are rich and flavorful, and the natural black olives taste exactly like authentic Mediterranean olives—salty, soft, and delicious.

The pomegranate molasses has a deep, balanced flavor, and the Turkish delight with pistachio and pomegranate is beautifully soft and not overly sweet. I also loved the linden tea; it smells amazing and brews very clean.

Fresh, authentic, and full of love! The owners are so kind and passionate about what they do. Every product — Turkish delight, olive oil, spices, and nuts — is top quality. You can truly taste the difference!
BERGAMOS BY BRY FOODS||806 COLLEGE ST M6.query: BERGAMOS BY BRY FOODS 806 COLLEGE ST Toronto

CAROUSEL BAKERY||93 FRONT ST E, #3738 M5.matchedAddress: 93 Front St E, Toronto, ON M5E 1M6, Canada
reviews:
Had a craving for an Apple Fritter.
Found the perfect place at the St. Lawrence Market.
These are a good size, we couldn’t finish them.
So yummy!!
The inly thing missing was a nice warm cup of coffee…
The Carousel Bakery is a must try.
Always a good go to for peameal bacon sandwich. Not too salty. Not dry at all. Just a great grab and go sandwich for $8.50. quick turnaround for food as they're all prepped and ready to go.

I stopped in around lunchtime and ordered the turkey club with fries. First thing I noticed was the bread — lightly toasted, warm, but still soft inside. The turkey tasted freshly sliced, not like packaged deli meat. Bacon was crispy and layered properly so you got some in every bite. They didn’t overload it with mayo, which I appreciated. The fries were hot and clearly made fresh. I’ve had a lot of average sandwiches — this wasn’t one of them. You can tell they care about basics.
I have stopped to try the famous Peamel bacon. Despite there is no sauce on the sandwich, it was really nice. Service is a bit rude. Place doesn't provide any table or small chair.

A great place to go if you're nostalgic otherwise I'm not sure what the big deal is.  The counter staff were grumpy, bordering on rude, after I ordered they just threw the pre made sandwich on the counter.  Really?  Flavor is just meh at best and I can tell it was sitting around for awhile before i bought it.  Much better options in the market.
CAROUSEL BAKERY||93 FRONT ST E, #3738 M5.editorialSummary: Bustling bakery stand in a large food marketplace, known for their signature peameal bacon sandwich.

This place slacks.. another customer was looking for their pizza they also gave it to the wrong persons

As I write this review there’s a bunch of us complaining on how ridiculous t

Haha the manager tried to short change me and steal a dollar when I paid cash but when I asked for extra peppers he wanted to charge me $0.09 per piece. reviews:
Soma Bone Broth is an incredible spot on the Danforth, just 200m from Pape Station. I tried the confit garlic chicken and it was absolutely delicious.

Steve was amazing and shared that they make broth for many other places as well. I can’t wait to try more of their bone broths. They also deliver with a 4-jar minimum.

This is such a great replacement for a fresh, healthy breakfast—sipping on hot, nourishing bone broth. Highly recommend checking them out!

Soma Bone Broth is hands down my absolute favourite bone broth! From the first sip, you can tell it’s made with high-quality, clean ingredients you can truly trust. I love that there are no unnecessary additives—just wholesome, nourishing goodness in every container.
They offer such a great variety of delicious flavours and variations, so there’s always something to suit your mood or the recipe you’re making. We enjoy sipping it on its own as a comforting, nutrient-rich drink, especially on cooler days. It’s also become a staple in our kitchen—we use it in soups, stews, sauces, grains, and eve

Soma’s bone broth is life! 🙌🏼🔥😋🔥🙌🏼
Extremely delicious, comforting, and revitalizing.

The other reviews are true;
once you have a cup, you’ll be hooked.
I try to get it as often as I can, and it satisfies every single time.
I also really like their beef tallow cream.  It is very nourishing.

Come in to heal you gut and soul 🧡

I have ordered online twice now, the first delivery took a few days but this delivery was quick. I recently had a dental surgery so having soft healthy foods was key and the quality of this broth is obvious from the moment you see the jars.

It's been great to ease into the day with a jar of broth before eating or drinking anything else. Setting the tone for quality. I got the collagen pack this time and the surgery sites are coming along fabulously. I  think that the broth is contributing to that! Good nutrion definitely helps and the quality is evidence of the care taken.

Definitely going t

This place is fantastic all around. First of all, the broth is high quality and has amazing flavour. Once you get a cup of it, you’re gonna get hooked. The temperature of the broth is also perfect, it’s hot but you can immediately sip on it (not scolding hot as most places serve their drinks). The team is also awesome and extremely welcoming and friendly. You’ll become a regular in no time here. There’s a big variety of other broths and options for delivery. Just go and experience for yourself!

P.S. Restaurants should definitely consider partnering up with Soma to serve their bone broth!!! As

reviews: The best fresh seafood store in Midtown Toronto has just moved from Yonge and Eglinton to Eglinton and Avenue. I'm a long time customer. This weekend I picked up some lobster tails, tuna, shrimp and scallops for my son's birthday dinner. Amazing quality. Everyone loved it. A couple times a month I buy a sushi-grade salmon fillet that I typically poach. The store is run by a couple who are the nicest people you could possibly meet. They were worried about the change in location but they told me all their regular customers have followed them there. Attached are photos of the two dishes from the

I called the store for the first time this last Friday. I was searching for lobster and oysters online and came across their site. After reading many positive reviews I called and spoke with Jean. I asked her if it was possible to do a tray of lobster and a few dozen oysters for the next day? Without hesitation Jean said yes. When I picked up everything the following day I was very pleased with the presentation. At the family gathering later that day everyone raved about the quality. Clearly Ian and Jean take tremendous pride in their business, I would not hesitate to return or to recommend th

What luck to have fresh fish in the neighborhood. I'm partial to the shrimps myself, especially since I don't have to clean them. The price is what you would expect to pay for quality. Drop by and check it out for yourself. Told ya, I'm partial to the shrimps, this took no time to prepare. Lightly sauteed with ochro, bak choy, ginger, garlic and a slightly hot banana pepper, accompanied by plain white rice. Uh, Uh good!
High quality sashimi salmon at really reasonable prices. Looking forward to checking the new location

I drive all the way from blue mountain to buy my fish from them.. the people are the sweetest and so helpful!! Honestly the quality of fish is mind blowing... and I am one of the pickiest people when it comes fish and I can only give outstanding praises to this store and their quality!!!

reviews:
If you’re searching for authentic Mumbai-style Indo-Chinese in Toronto, this place needs to be at the top of your list. The Szechwan chutney here is unbelievable—spicy, aromatic, and exactly like we get in Mumbai

Triple Szechwan Fried Rice (with Soup) – 5/5

The rice is perfectly cooked with separate grains, generous chicken pieces, and a different Szechwan flavour as well—not salty, not soy-heavy, and definitely not only spicy like many places don’t  have any taste ; this place actually got some tastel. This is the closest Triple Szechwan I’ve had in Toronto that actually resembles Mumbai Ch

Absolutely delicious food and great experience!

We recently ordered from this Mumbai 74 Hakka and Indian Cuisine, everything was outstanding from start to finish. The Hot and Sour Soup had the perfect balance of spice and tang, and the Corn Soup was rich, creamy, and full of flavor. Both were a great start to the meal!

The Hakka Noodles and Fried Rice were perfectly cooked — full of fresh veggies, great wok flavor, and generous portions. And the highlight for us was definitely the Chicken 65 — crispy, flavorful, and just the right amount of heat.

Everything tasted fresh, well-seasoned, and

Updated Review: Originally ordered Chicken triple schezwan rice and lollipop and rated 2 star given the taste. However, the owner was kind enough to rectify and hand deliver the replacement food. And this time, the Chicken triple was exceptional and very close to mumbai street food (just like the other reviews). Looks like I was unlucky the 1st time. Highly recommended but just go with their regular sauces (not the healthy version). To whomever that delivered the food, thank you, much respect that the restaurant took time to rectify our order. Will order again.

Chicken Triple Rice – 2.5/5 (Rice), 1/5 (Soup)

I was excited to try this place because many reviews mentioned that it tastes like Mumbai-style Hakka Chinese. Having lived in Mumbai all my life, I can confidently say it doesn’t resemble Mumbai Hakka Chinese—maybe a 1.5 or 2 out of 5 in that aspect.

Soup:
The soup was extremely disappointing. The quantity was barely one ladle with just two chicken chunks, and it tasted heavily of soy sauce. It was thick like a paste because of excess cornflour and didn’t feel fresh at all. Overall, I’d give the soup 1/5.

Rice:
The rice quantity was great, and

Best Mumbai-Style Hakka food.

I tried their Hakka Noodles, Chicken Lollipop, and Paneer Manchurian, and honestly this place gave me exact Mumbai-style Hakka Chinese taste. The flavours were exactly like the street-style food we grew up eating.

The Hakka Noodles were really good- not too oily, not too saucy, and had that real wok flavour. The vegetables used were fresh and the spice level was just right. The best part is that the noodles were not drowned in soy sauce like many other places in GTA. If you miss proper Mumbai Hakka noodles, this is the place to try. Highly recommend!.

I once tried their butter paneer pizza in Windsor, and trust me it was unforgettable 👌.  Very first bite gives me the satisfaction of having something too good. I glad they are here in Scarborough. 😇

Absolutely amazing! This Samosa Chaat Pizza is next-level — the perfect blend of Indian street food flavor and cheesy pizza goodness. Every bite is bursting with spice, tang, and crunch. The sauces on top (mint and tamarind-style drizzles) are perfectly balanced and make it super addictive.

You can literally taste the freshness in the toppings — crispy samosa bits, red onions, herbs, and that creamy drizzle that ties it all together. The crust was perfectly baked, not too thick, not too thin.

The selection of nail polish is quite extensive, and they even offered TPO- and HEMA–free polish options.

I’ll definitely rebook here for my next

I got my nails done with Max and chose gel extensions, and the experience was amazing. He was incredibly **meticulous**, constantly checking the details as he worked, which I really appreciated. The owner and all the staff were also very kind and welcoming, so the overall atmosphere felt great. The color I picked is called FS50 (korean gel nail polish), and I absolutely love how it turned out.
Beautiful salon with a clean, stylish aesthetic and such friendly staff. The service was great, and everyone was welcoming and attentive. I loved my nails and will definitely be back!

Absolutely loved my experience at this nail salon. The space is clean, relaxing, and welcoming. Max was amazing—so friendly, professional, and detail-oriented. reviews: We go to Ramona’s on Bayview semi regularly so we’re happy to see another location open in our neighborhood. The menu has a great variety and we are always happy with our order. Today we had the deluxe burger and the turkey blt. Everything tasted so fresh and was made with great high quality ingredients, and the fries were perfectly crispy. The food is incredibly fresh. They also use real butter on the toast. Our wait person Diana, was attentive without being intrusive - a rare quality.

The ambiance is warm and inviting, like being at a friend’s place for lunch.

Highly recommend.

We had such amazing service from Naz.... she explained the menu and asked if we had any questions she would be more then happy to help.  She recommended dishes and dessert which were all delicious

Liz and John are wonderful

We then shared the raspberry cheese cake and chocolate chip cookie ...mouth

The portions were generous, and the taste was amazing. For me, I had their turkey burger served with a side of sweet potato fries. It was equally delicious and filling. The coffee was good, and I was happy they had oat milk available. The staff was friendly and courteous. This won’t be the last time we’re having dinner here!

The breakfast bagel was so beautiful to look at and it tasted so fantastic! And since the egg yolk was runny it was tricky to eat the middle part without getting messy.

The crispy fish sandwich was so crispy! I loved all the flavours. Only minor criticism is I found there was more bun than fish so the bread overpowered the yummy battered fish taste.

I’ve seen some reviews on here complaining about the portion sizes. I would tend to disagree. I can usually eat a lot, 2 foot longs at subway type. The sauce is so creamy and rich that a single portion was perfect to leave me stuffed but not heavy.

I personally preferred the spicy seafood cream udon. More complex flavors and a good amount of seafood for a dollar mor

Food:

- Chicken Curry Udon: Highly recommended in many reviews and it did not disappoint. It’s a little heavy, so if you’re looking for a light meal, consider something else.

- Buta Udon: Delicious, fragrant broth with light and tender pork belly. The noodles were nice and chewy.

If you’re craving comforting Japanese food done right, Mikaku Udon Bar absolutely delivers. The udon was so good perfectly chewy noodles, rich flavorful broth, and everything tasted fresh and thoughtfully prepared. The portion sizes were generous too, which made it feel like great value for the quality you’re getting. You leave feeling full and satisfied, not like you need to grab something else after.

What really stood out was the service. It was incredibly fast and genuinely sweet and attentive without being overbearing. The whole experience felt smooth from start to finish. Definitely a sp

Amazing food, amazing service, amazing decor. Yes, they offer alcohol but their chicken are halal. It's always a treat to find Halal Japanese food. Service was very nice and friendly. Of course most importantly, the food is amazing and reasonably priced.

reviews:
Istanbul Fine Foods is a great supermarket in North York, and it honestly feels like stepping into a local market back in Turkey. What really stands out is their in-house bakery. The bakers make fresh lahmacun and somun ekmek that taste just like the ones you’d find at a neighborhood fırın in Turkey. The lahmacun lunch option is around 6 CAD, and it’s extremely delicious, fresh, and great value for money. You can smell the bread and baking as you walk in, which already sets the mood.

Beyond the bakery, the store has a wide selection of Turkish products on the shelves. From dry goods and snack

I had a great experience at Istanbul Fine Foods. The store has a nice variety of products and everything looked fresh and well organized. Buse at the cashier was amazing. She is very friendly, patient, and welcoming. She made the whole checkout experience really pleasant. Great customer service! I’ll definitely come back.

I visited Istanbul Fine Foods today and was really impressed! The store has a great selection of fresh vegetables and groceries. I tried their lahmacun — it was delicious and very reasonably priced. They also bake fresh Turkish bread and even Ramazan pide, which tastes amazing. Everything here is fresh and high quality. I definitely recommend this place to everyone!

As someone from Azerbaijan, I’ve been missing the tastes of home for a long time — and I finally found them here! Istanbul Fine Foods has such a wonderful selection of Turkish products, and many of them reminded me of the flavors I grew up with. The quality is amazing, and it feels so comforting to see these familiar items in Canada. Thank you for bringing these products here!
Really nice grocery store with a great selection. The staff were friendly and the store was well organized. Special thanks to Buse at the cashier, she was very sweet and helpful!

reviews: I walk past this store a few times a week and I've tried and enjoyed their cheese bread in the past, however, my recent experience was quite disappointing. To start, there were giant posters for a cheese bread + drink combo, but after I ordered it, I was told that the deal expired. Why would you keep the poster up if the deal is over? Not to mention, it's been over a month since the deal ended, which just shows laziness from the staff/owners to not take it down. Since the combo was expired, I decided to just get the strawberry matcha latte. I didn't have high expectations because I don't think
Delicious delicious~~ so unique varieties of goods that are hard to find elsewhere.
Really liked the avacado toast! However it's pretty pricey for just a toast, but the bread was so crunchy and tasty. I'll definitely come back.

Super soft buns! Not too sweet and nice and creamy.

Finally had the chance to try cheese baker a little while back and was not disappointed!

The original cheese bun was so perfectly done. The bread was soft and even after biting would just bounce back to its tall height!

The dragonfruit bun was what I was looking forward to! It did have dragonfruit taste, but only wish is that it was stronger in flavour! But the bread, SOFT AGAIN!

The puffs had that nice craquelin top and the cream was nice and smooth! With the lychee, you get that super strong lychee flavour, which was really nice!

For t

This was so good. I got the durian cheese bun and was not disappointed, they put actual durian fruit inside! The bread was SO fluffy and had that delicious chewy quality after you bite in. The cheesiness is like a whipped cream cheese that has been flawlessly mixed in with the bread dough, it’s a baking miracle honestly. The shop is small and is for takeout only so drop by, pick up some delicious bread, and eat it in the comfort of your own home. I will definitely be going back to try more flavours!!

reviews: Had a wonderful experience at this café! The service was excellent from start to finish. The caramel macchiato and croissant sandwich was absolutely delicious and perfectly made. The flavors really stood out, and you can tell a lot of care goes into their food and drinks. I’ll definitely be coming back the next time I’m in this area. Highly recommend!

I recommend going to this cafe!! They have a warm, cozy atmosphere that makes it the perfect spot to study or work. Most seating spots have outlets, perfect for studying! The food is delicious, and the drinks—especially the cold drinks—are top-notch. Highly recommended for anyone looking for great study spot with comfort and quality.

The Vanilla Iced latte hit the spot. Perfectly sweet. The cafe has seating and tables if you have a computer. Will try the carrot cake next time it looked really good!
They brew Hatch coffee.

A truly amazing café! It’s perfect for studying because the atmosphere is calm and smooth, with soft background music that helps you focus. reviews:
We visited South Indian Street Bites for dinner with our family and had a lovely experience. The restaurant is small but has very cute and cozy interiors, with three booths and separate tables. We were seated right away in one of the booths.

It was our first time trying Punnugulu, so we ordered the Chinna Punnugulu along with Karvepaku Gobi as appetizers. For the main course, we chose the Vegetarian Fried Rice and the SSS Special Chicken Fried Rice. The server asked about our spice preference, and we requested spicy. We also ordered Ghee Idly for our little one.

We really enjoyed the Punnugu

Great experience at this restaurant on Saturday evening! We ordered the Mysore Bonda and Veg Manchurian Noodles, and both dishes were absolutely delicious. We loved the food and will definitely be coming back.

The breakfast buffet was quite nice! We walked in on a Saturday morning to the ‘Srinivasa Venkatesa’ music which felt beautiful. The restaurant decor and seating is good too. Specially the uggani with mirchi bajji, poori with besan curry and upma were delicious. The tea is fantastic!

Based On My baised experience on February 14 2026.

Ambience was on point with great atmosphere and nice space and available seats. There was no waiting when we visited at round 2:45 PM EST. One big complaint was that the serving staff was too slow and we had to wait.
Food well it was Pro level spicy. Red chilli and spices on the Food was just next level.
My wife, a spicy food lover was begging for sugar because of the thing
she ordered, the Dosa chicken curry's spice level. Complicated statement.

The show stopper Chilli chicken which has the spiciest of red chill.spice I have eaten.

I doubt

Had a great experience at Street Bites! The dosa was absolutely delicious — perfectly crisp on the outside and soft inside, just the way it should be. The flavours were authentic and satisfying. The ambience is really nice as well — clean, welcoming, and comfortable for dining in.

A special mention to Jayshree for the warm and friendly service. She made the experience even better with her attentive and positive attitude.

Definitely coming back again!

reviews: Tried Korean pizza for the first time. It tasted pretty good. I love how they have a huge variety of flavours to choose from, including adding toppings into the crust. However it is a bit more pricey than others. We also enjoyed the grilled chicken.

I was really excited to be able to try Korean pizza—specifically goguma pizza, since it’s not a thing here. We got the holy sweet potato pizza and toppoki, and my brother got katsu from katsuya (because both are at same place). Firstly, the atmosphere was quite nice, it’s pretty dimly lit and mainly booth seating and table seating. You also get a view of the kitchen. The bathroom is downstairs. They were clean but smelled pretty bad for some reason. Anyways, we were first served toppoki which was really nice! It included fish cakes, half a boiled egg, crab sticks and cabbage. It was a great wa

Tried Pizza Maru and this Korean pizza was sooo good omg. It was light, airy, and packed with flavor without leaving you feeling sick or heavy after eating. My partner and I shared one and still had leftovers. Such a satisfying and different take on pizza, would definitely go back.

How could you call this "Chicago pizza"? It’s completely different from the Chicago pizza I’ve known til now. At the very least, the Chicago pizza I know should have more toppings and be much thicker. It looks completely different from the photos. I can’t believe I paid $38(without tax) for this… The taste is just exactly same as a regular sweet potato pizza. Very disappointed

Got the Maru Five pizza and shared it with a friend. Overall it tasted pretty good but the beef ribs was kind of dry. The spicy sauce also has a kick to it. For someone who like spicy food, it was actually spicy. They do put alot of toppings on the pizza. We also got the garlic and sirarcha mayo dip. The garlic dip has a strong garlic flavor.

The parking lot here is kind of small so it might be difficult to find a parking space. The entrance to pizza maru is also kinda of confusing because it shares the same entrance as katsuya.

This is a superb shop.  The tamales are fantastic.  The hot table dishes are superb, and it has all of those hard to find things for cooking. The food was delicious, the drinks are highly recommended, and the prices are very reasonable. I went with my friends, and everyone really enjoyed the atmosphere. Milena’s service was absolutely outstanding – incredibly friendly, attentive, and made the whole experience even more memorable. I’ll definitely be back!

Pura Vida is my husband and I go-to place. We were already seduced by the food and service at their previous location.

Now that they moved in a bigger space and decorated the place, it’s even better!

The food is tasty and the team is super friendly. The place is super versatile: if you’re looking for a meal to celebrate, have a date night or family-friendly, this is the place to go!

The menu has many options that will please everybody. I am in love with their Pina Coladas, the Pura Vida Special with beef stew and the Coconut Delight dessert.

I highly recommend the place! 💕

We went with our 2 small kids and had a great time. The decor is absolutely beautiful, it transported us down south for an hour. Our waiter was very kind and helpful. The food was delicious. Our suggestion is to have the option of plain fries for the kids menu - they had some seasoning and kids can be a little picky. Our server was so kind to bring us some plain rice as a substitute. The ceviche was fresh and delicious. Highly recommend this spot!

The atmosphere was lovely as well as the musical talent. That was there that night. We both had an awesome time. The food was delicious  and plentiful. I place pics of the shrimp tacos they don’t miss.

My standouts were the chicken wings and the chicken rice bowl - the grilled veggie add on was also worth it! Topped mine with mango habanero and mild and both were so good. I’ll be back to try some of their other sides, like their mac and cheese!

worst of all, the strawberry cheesecake they gave me was moldy.

Onion rings were good though.

CHO-KWOK-LAT (WELLESLEY)||79 WELLESLEY S.matchedAddress: 79 Wellesley St E, Toronto, ON M4Y 0G5, Canada
reviews:
Came in the morning to try some of their pastries and desserts, the pastries were good overall, very well done. The desserts though, is really outstanding here. We only tried 2 so far, but the flavors were really good and well balanced. You can really taste all the different flavors that is in the description. We tried the William Noir (the chocolate was so deliciously rich) and the exotic coconut mango passionfruit (well balanced and light). Definitely coming back to try more!
We didn't stay in the shop to eat, but it's modern, and comfortable. Nice place to sit and have a chat for sure.

I’ve purchased many pastries from here before and generally enjoyed them. The food tastes good overall.

However, during my recent visit, I found a thin metal wire inside the mocha pillow pastry. Thankfully I noticed it before anything happened, but it was quite shocking and definitely affected my experience.

While the pastries are tasty, this incident made me concerned about food safety and hygiene standards. I hope the team takes this seriously and reviews their preparation process to prevent something like this from happening again.

Really good desserts and pastries, the interior is also so pretty and well decorated. We got the pistachio latte and hojicha latte, with a yoyo and croffin. The drinks were really good but the main star were the dessert and pastry. The croffin was really inventive with a delicious sweet potato custard like filling and The yoyo was a perfect balance of sweet and sour and creamy. Highly recommend this cafe!

I’ve tried most of their pastries, several desserts, and their cappuccino — all of which were excellent in quality and taste. The café itself is very clean, nicely designed, and has a calm, cool atmosphere that makes it a pleasant place to relax. It’s never too crowded, which adds to the comfort. Prices are a little on the higher side for what you get, but overall, it’s a lovely spot with great food and consistent quality.

An absolutely wonderful coffee shop! The atmosphere is warm, cozy, and inviting — the kind of place you instantly feel comfortable whether you’re stopping by for a quick coffee or staying longer to relax. The customer service is outstanding: friendly, attentive, and genuinely welcoming.

The desserts are simply delicious — fresh, beautifully presented, and perfectly balanced in sweetness. You can really tell a lot of care goes into everything they serve.

A perfect spot for great coffee, amazing treats, and an overall lovely experience. I’ll definitely be coming back and highly recommend it!

KIM'S NOODLE||1549 STEELES AVE E M2M 3Y7.matchedAddress: 1549 Steeles Ave E, North York, ON M2M 3Y7, Canada
reviews:
We visited on Friday evening. Around 9:00 PM, there were only a few groups dining, so there were plenty of tables and the space felt quite spacious.

We ordered Kim’s Jeyuk Deop-Bap, a small Tangsuyouk, and Bokkeum Jjamppong. Overall, the portions were great and it was a very satisfying dinner. I loved the spiciness level of the Jjamppong (regular) and the generous amount of shrimp and squid. I'll definitely bring friends back to try more of the menu!

The food is here is absolutely amazing. My second time here because I was craving the jjangmyun and their tangsuyuk. Idk how they make the tangsuyuk so crispy and chewy, but it’s my absolute fave. My cravings always get satisfied when I come here. Before the food even comes I always end up finishing the radish too hahah. This place is awesome.

The menu isn’t huge, which makes picking what to order a lot easier. We got the noodles, and they were perfectly bouncy, while the chicken was crispy but still juicy. Everything was super tasty, and we each got our own bowls to share, which was a nice touch. The prices are really reasonable, and the portions are big! The service was quick too.

The vibe of the place is laid-back and chill, which I liked. It’s not all fancy or anything. They take credit cards but if you bring cash, you get a 10% discount, so that's a win!

Had a late lunch here on Saturday.  It was my first time and I loved it. We arrived around 2pm. Lots of free parking available.  We received a friendly greeting and directed to an open table. Every table had a little tablet to order from. You can also request other items.  Each table has drawers with cutlery and napkins. We ordered Kim's JJamppong and a new item (white JJamppong). The first is spice and had a deepr flavour from the  pork. The second is brimming with smoky flavour. Both are great! And of course the noodles 🍜 are a huge highlight.  We also ordered sweet and sour pork. Very uniqu

We came at 5:30pm on a weekday and ordered jjamppong (regular spicy), jjangmyuen, and yuringi (fried chicken with sweet and spicy sauce). Honestly SO GOOD! Best Kfood I have had in awhile. The tea was nice and strong too. Service was great and the restaurant was clean! So happy!
KIM'S NOODLE||1549 STEELES AVE E M2M 3Y7.query: KIM'S NOODLE 1549 STEELES AVE E Toronto

ALADDIN SHAWARMA & SANDWICH HOUSE||2022.matchedAddress: 2022 Sheppard Ave E, North York, ON M2J 4T8, Canada
reviews:
I recently visited Aladdin Shawarma House – North York, and it turned out to be a great experience overall. Unlike many shawarma spots in the city, this location wasn’t overly crowded, which made the visit much more comfortable and relaxed. There was no long wait, and the service felt smooth and organized.

The food was amazing. One thing that really stood out was their spicy chicken option — it had the perfect level of heat without overpowering the flavor. The seasoning was bold, well-balanced, and packed with taste. Every bite was fresh and satisfying. The portions were generous, and you def

First time here and it’s extremely clean and food looks so fresh! I tried their bbq chicken shawarma wrap combo with fries, and everything tastes really really good. Happy I tried this place. Ladies are sweet, thank you!!

Update: while I was dining in, a health inspector came in to do a random check in. Not only did she seem impressed to me from what she saw, but she also commented on how CLEAN the establishment is and how the food looks fresh.
First time trying Aladdin Shawarma House. I ordered a chicken shawarma and a chicken plate. The food was made fresh to order and it tasted fine. Parking lot was very full and hard to find parking.

I ordered from Aladdin Shawarma House for delivery and I was very impressed! The food arrived fresh, warm, and beautifully prepared. The flavors were amazing, and the shawarma was delicious, well-seasoned, and satisfying.

Even through delivery, the quality of the food and the care in packaging were clear. Everything was neat, tasty, and enjoyable.

Thank you for the great food and excellent service. I truly appreciate the effort and quality, and I will definitely order again. Highly recommended!
Amazing food, the bbq chicken was just amazingly juicy and the fires were very nice also. Seating was ample and comfortable. Will definitely visit again if back in town.
ALADDIN SHAWARMA & SANDWICH HOUSE||2022.query: ALADDIN SHAWARMA & SANDWICH HOUSE 2022 SHEPPARD AVE E Toronto

OM MA JOHN'S PIZZA & THAI EXPRESS||162 M.matchedAddress: 162 Main St, Toronto, ON M4E 2V8, Canada
reviews: I visited this restaurant a few days ago- located in convenient area, walking distance near the major intersection of Main St. and Gerrard St. Great atmosphere when you you walk in, owners were very hospitable and provided quick service. Pizza was very fresh and tasty- the crust was nice and came with a variety of toppings. Noticed they have a variety of other appealing menu items to try, including their Butter Chicken Pizza, so will definitely try that next time I come by. Highly recommend!

Couple of months ago, someone (random) told me the food was good here, being new to the neighbourhood I really wanted to try it because the person made it sound good. Placed an order, walked home and the paper bag with handles my food was put in became unglued somehow at the bottom and my order ended up on the sidewalk. I was so embarrassed because there was a lot of traffic on Gerrard street. Called them and told them what happened, they said to come back and at that point I was so drained, both physically and emotionally (after going through a family death, another in the hospital and then m

I had a very disappointing experience at this restaurant. When my meal was served, I was shocked to find a strand of hair in the food. Understandably, this is both unhygienic and unappetizing, and it made the dish completely inedible for me.

Trying to handle the situation politely, I approached the owner to explain what had happened and requested either a refund or a replacement, since it is impossible to enjoy food that is contaminated in such a way. Instead of responding with professionalism, courtesy, or even an apology, the owner became argumentative and defensive. Rather than acknowledgi

I recently had the Shawarma plate and Butter Chicken here, and both dishes were absolutely delicious! The Shawarma was packed with flavor, tender, and perfectly spiced. The Butter Chicken was rich, creamy, and had just the right amount of heat—easily one of the best I’ve had. On top of that, the owner was really friendly and welcoming, which made the whole experience even better. Definitely a spot I’ll be coming back to!

The service was top notch. I was served by a lady here very friendly and polite. Offered me to try the sauces before I purchased my pound of wings and slice.

Prices are good and fair.

Having a small space to sit down and dine. Given how close the oven is to the front counter. It is nice and toasty to be in here.
OM MA JOHN'S PIZZA & THAI EXPRESS||162 M.query: OM MA JOHN'S PIZZA & THAI EXPRESS 162 Toronto

reviews:
Wow first time trying and I’m obsessed! Best version I’ve tried so far (and I’ve tried 5 other versions). The filling is thick and soft and the taste from the chocolate to filling is absolutely delicious. The package and presentation of the chocolate bar is perfection.
You got yourself a new addict

I finally tried the strawberry cup after reading all the great reviews. I’d been eyeing this place for a while and had high expectations, but honestly, it didn’t quite live up to the hype. I’ve had strawberry cups at around 20 different spots across the GTA, and this one wouldn’t make my top 5.

That said, I haven’t tried their Dubai chocolates yet, and I’m still planning to come back for that - maybe that’s where they really shine. Also, a quick mention to Nora, who was friendly and helpful during my visit.

The only Dubai chocolate bar that I'll ever buy again, so much crunch from the kataifi, So much kataifi in general, nothing compares to this one, Costco ones are gross, ones that I bought In a specialty store, don't even compare! These are absolutely amazing. My only Achilles' heel are these chocolate bars. The only ones that come close to this are the ones that my niece makes by hand, which is rarely because she lives so far away, I will continue to have them shipped to me Because I don't live close to Toronto, thank you again for the great customer service as well! I will be a repeat buyer f
It was very delicious and appetizing. The strawberry cup is my favorite. The welcoming was very nice and the place is very calm. Everyone should try this place!

The best Dubai chocolate that I’ve ever had! Amazing quality of chocolate and the filling is better than anywhere else, including Laderach. Highest quality closest to the real thing, right here in Toronto!  This is my new go to place. I’m obsessed… I can’t stop going back for more!

My daughter and I even sat in the cafe and had a latte. The shop keepers are so genuine and sweet. You can tell they are good people!
DUBAIMO||1020 ST CLAIR AVE W M6E 1A4.query: DUBAIMO 1020 ST CLAIR AVE W Toronto

LAON||453 DUNDAS ST W, 1ST FLOOR M5T 1G8.matchedAddress: 453 Dundas St W Main Floor, Toronto, ON M5T 1G8, Canada
reviews:
Went here last week with a friend, she recommended this cafe after having brunch around the area. The space is pretty roomy, with a few seats near the entrance and several tables in the back, so it didn’t feel cramped at all. The drinks were really good, and the desserts were too! The dessert I got was very sweet but goes well with the bitter drinks!

My friend ordered a matcha, and I got a coffee drink (lol I forgot the name), but I loved it. I’m usually not a big foam person, but this one was perfect. I was worried it might be too sweet or too bitter, but the bottom was slightly bitter while

Matcha drink was lighter than expected, but nicely balanced.
Cream foam on top was smooth and creamy, with hot matcha underneath that stayed well rounded and comforting.
The real star, though, was the cake(Matcha terrine).
Dense, rich, and deeply matcha-forward  bold, intense, and incredibly satisfying.
10/10. Finished every bite.
Highly recommended, especially for the matcha cake.
The café itself is quiet and calm, though a bit too dim for me.
Cozy, but slightly sleep-inducing perfect for those who enjoy a peaceful, low-key atmosphere.

The menu at La_On is fantastic, but the service experience was a bit stressful. I ordered a matcha latte with oat milk, a Nutty Coffee (which had a really nice foam and was very easy to drink), and the Grey It Matcha. I absolutely loved the Earl Grey foam on the Grey It Matcha—it’s a standout! For dessert, the tiramisu is highly recommended; it’s light and not too sweet.
Unfortunately, the barista/cashier was very impatient. Despite there being no long line, he kept rushing me and asking “That’s it?” every time I tried to add another item to my order. It’s a shame because the quality of the dr

My friend and I both really enjoyed this café! We shared three desserts (earl grey terrine, sesame Basque cheesecake, and original tiramisu ball) and each got a matcha cream latte.
We loved everything. The terrine was a bit sweet for my taste but I loved the strong earl grey flavor. My friend had previously said she didn't think she liked matcha, but has a completely different view on it after trying the latte here!
Also feel like the prices are very reasonable for the level of quality. Definitely recommend.

Cafe La_On is one of my favourite cafes in Toronto! It's cozy, welcoming, & perfect for relaxing or catching up with friends. The drinks were delicious & well made, and the desserts were just as good. The staff were friendly & attentive, too, which made the experience even better. My friends & I will definitely be back! (:
LAON||453 DUNDAS ST W, 1ST FLOOR M5T 1G8.query: LAON 453 DUNDAS ST W, 1ST FLOOR Toronto

reviews: Most briyanis are bone in only. You can just rename them as bone briyani since there's no meat at all. Paying $20 for just 4 pieces of bones is totally worthless.
Good ambience and nice customer service in the town. Raja Special chicken Biriyani is on point
excellent food and customer service. 😄

We visited this restaurant over the weekend, and unfortunately, it was a very disappointing experience.
As soon as the food arrived, we started questioning the quality and taste. The naan was extremely thin and crumbly, and a good portion of it went to waste. The curries had much more gravy than meat and lacked flavor overall—you could mainly taste raw tomato rather than a well-balanced dish.
We ordered two different biryanis, but both were undercooked. The rice was not fully done, and the spices were not properly blended. On top of that, there was hardly any difference in taste between the tw
Awesome food !!

DOMO SUSHI||844 SHEPPARD AVE W M3H 2T5.matchedAddress: 844 Sheppard Ave W, North York, ON M3H 5H7, Canada
reviews: I ordered takeout from this place and was really impressed! Everything was well presented and super fresh. The salmon sashimi and sushi were buttery and perfectly cut, and the rolls had great variety, from classic California to crispy, saucy specialty rolls. The sauces were flavorful without overpowering the fish, and the portion size was generous for the price.

The salmon sashimi is of low quality. Portions on the sashimi are very small and light in colour. The wasabi tasted stale and old. Rolls are at most a 2/5. My daughter likes to eat the radish and kale sides but were old and stale as well. Easy to order on the phone but never again.

I recently ordered a party tray from this authentic sushi restaurant, and it was incredible! The salmon sushi was incredibly fresh, and the orange and green dragon rolls were bursting with flavor. The tuna sashimi was melt-in-your-mouth perfect, and the spicy salmon with crispy topping added a great kick. I’ve never had sushi this fresh and delicious! The quality is top-notch, and the price is very reasonable for the amazing taste you get. I strongly recommend trying this place—you won’t be disappointed!

New place, all the hype. Great and delicious food, great service, and free parking up front. Good for takeout, although has few seats inside in the case you want to eat it there.  Some selection of Japanese and Korean snacks and drinks as well.

As a non sushi eater, who has friends who love sushi, I appreciate this location for the chicken options they have.

Got a chicken Karaage bowl and Spicy chicken Karaage appetizer. Both were good. Bowl I filling. Definitely add a sauce to it to improve overall flavour but would get it again.

Satisfied my cravings 7.5/10.
DOMO SUSHI||844 SHEPPARD AVE W M3H 2T5.query: DOMO SUSHI 844 SHEPPARD AVE W Toronto

ALFORAT IRAQI STREET FOOD||1756 VICTORIA.matchedAddress: 1756 Victoria Park Ave, North York, ON M1R 1R4, Canada
reviews: Both the lamb/beef and chicken sharwama had generous portions on meat and were delicious.  The chicken sharwama had a generous helping of sweet pomegranate sauce that makes it different from the typical sharwama joint.  The 3 types of bread (you get to pick one) for the wrap are all ok, and are not made fresh to order (or recently to order). The hummus lacks richness, which seems to be the result of not enough tahini.  The service was quick, very friendly and helpful.  The place is bright and had a good atmosphere for casual dining.

Tried Alforat Iraqi Street Food and really enjoyed the family platter—for $80, it comes loaded with chicken and beef shawarma, kabobs, fries, garlic sauce, hummus, pickles, and coleslaw, with generous portions and great presentation. Also you get lentil soup the moment you enter the restaurant and in this cold it tasted really nice for my throat. The chicken shawarma was my favorite, followed by the kabobs; the beef/lamb shawarma was flavorful but had a very strong lamb smell, so if you’re sensitive to that, I’d skip it. Fries were excellent, the restaurant and washroom were clean, customer se

We tried Iraqi food for the first time and got 2 boxes: lamb and beef shawarma arabi, and chicken shawarma arabi. We asked for hummus with it, but got baba ganouj instead and wish they put more of it. Plenty of garlic though and we couldn't finish it! We had a 30-ish minute wait-time which I felt was a little too long.

Note: Iraqi shawarma has pomegranate molasses! Something new we didn't realize.

I would come again but go for something different.

Excellent all around! Great portions and incredibly delicious food. The lady with blonde hair gave exceptional customer service, top notch. Even with takeout, we were offered pea soup while waiting, which was such a nice touch. Everything was well packaged, and the restaurant was super clean. No complaints at all. Ordered two Saj Chicken. Tuesday evening visit.

I was excited to try this shawarma spot. The shawarma is super easy to make seen lots of platter orders come before mine. Long long wait 45 min + I think they forgot about my order till I asked for my receipt. That was okay still for me I have waited long and the food makes it worth it. Eventually as more workers came out the energy picked up and I received my food. They put cooked onions in the wrap which already tasted weird. And my wrap had no molasses sauce which makes the wrap obviously taste better. It tasted like a Costco rotisserie chicken on a pita. Overrated and bland. Also I asked f
ALFORAT IRAQI STREET FOOD||1756 VICTORIA.query: ALFORAT IRAQI STREET FOOD 1756 VICTORIA PARK AVE Toronto

HAYAL KURDISH RESTAURANT||860 WILSON AVE.matchedAddress: 860 Wilson Ave, North York, ON M3K 1E5, Canada
reviews:
I went to Hayal Kurdish Çigkofte Restaurant and absolutely loved it. The food was delicious, and the music really made me feel like I was back home. I especially appreciated that the kitchen is open and visible from the seating area—you can clearly see how clean it is, which made me feel very comfortable. The staff were very kind and attentive. I left truly happy and satisfied. Highly recommend.
Her bijîn hevalno

Absolutely loved this place and we can't wait to come back! We've never had Kurdish food and boy were we in for a treat. When I saw the menu I thought a lot was similar to Turkish food and foods that I've tried at Turkish restaurants, you don't even need to go to Turkish restaurants anymore because wow 10/10 the flavours blew our tastebuds out of the water. Don't believe me? Try it yourself. For a little less than $85 (with tax and 25% tip) it fed my husband and I and we had leftovers for at least 1 more person both as an entree and a dessert (and that complimentary tea was delicious, very smo

A Must-Visit: Authentic, Flavorful, and Incredibly Welcoming!
I had a wonderful dinner at Hayal Kurdish Restaurant on Wilson Avenue last night, and I'm already planning my next visit!

The atmosphere was so warm and inviting. It feels less like a restaurant and more like you're a welcome guest in someone's home.

But the food... wow! We started with a selection of mezzes, and that were bursting with fresh, bright flavours. The bread served alongside it was warm, pillowy, and great for dipping.

For the main course, I went with the grilled kebab platters, and it was cooked quite well. The meat

This is such a nice restaurant. Wherever I go, I visit Kurdish restaurants for my work as a food writer. The food here was very good. What surprised me is that it was authentic and tasted like a Kurdish mum prepared it. Which in fact is true knowing the owner is a Kurdish mum. :) my parents and I really enjoyed our visit and would recommend everyone to eat here. Only minus point is that it is not very centrally located. Still, if you want to try real Kurdish food, this is the place.

Small place (7 tables) not loud, amazing food and friendly staff. Portions are large but if you can't finish it it's worth taking home.

For the platter most places dry out the chicken but this was delicious moist on the inside and crunch, smokey flavour on the outside.

Their house made baklava is crunchy and not too sweet.

The plaza has limited parking but you can park around the corner. Definitely with visiting with friends and family.
HAYAL KURDISH RESTAURANT||860 WILSON AVE.query: HAYAL KURDISH RESTAURANT 860 WILSON AVE Toronto

reviews:
They’ve stolen from me 3 times now…

First time they just marked the order as delivered and never arrived.

Second time they said my street was too snowy (it was cleared and they never left the store lol)

Third time they said they were out of Salami and then when I replaced a new order they just left it at “being prepared”… Karan Singh Tanwar will call you to just breathe at you on the phone…

This third time has now turned into over an hour on the phone with customer service.

I recently tried this location for the first time and ordered a vegetarian pizza — and I must say, it was one of the best pizzas I've had from any chain pizza store. The crust was perfectly cooked, and the flavors were spot on.

While picking up my order, I had the pleasure of meeting the owner, Amol. He was very friendly, clear in communication, and handled everything efficiently. The service was quick, the pizza was fresh and delicious, and the overall experience was excellent. In and out with great taste and great service!

Highly recommend this location. Looking forward to coming back agai

I was feeling cold and then i stopped by to have a slice and take a pee but the slice was kept in oven for 10-15 seconds still cold and somehow i couldn’t finish the single slice and at the end i wanted yo take a pee yet the i couldn’t use the washroom  after paying 6 dollars for the slice too. Pathetic service experience ever.

I am writing this review while I am still here, so that the management could understand how terrible the service was. I sat for more than 20min waiting for my order. The guy served couple of customer's orders that came after us name is Ansh. He left my order on top of the stove and i had to come and ask him. He denied he took my order. That was the most worst service ever. Our order was ready at 7:38 but i got it at 8:08 after asking for it. This is totally unacceptable!!! fyi i was with my 2 kids craving for their treat!!!

The new owner has transformed the environment into a safe and welcoming place, and the new attendant also provides excellent and friendly service.

Update from December 23, 2024: I visited the restaurant on this date, and it had many garbage visible to the public. I placed my order, and, incredibly, the attendant lost the order slip. After 35 minutes, I followed up on my order, only to find out that they didn’t even realize they had to make my pizza. This is extremely disrespectful to customers—I felt disrespected and very upset about the situation. This store had significantly improved its se

NGANDA AFRICAN STREET FOOD||936 GERRARD.matchedAddress: 936 Gerrard St E, Toronto, ON M4M 1Z2, Canada
reviews: The food was amizing and my friends and I had a good time when we were there 👏🏼😀
The food was impeccable and the service is wonderful 🥰🔥🤩 I recommend it

I went there with my friends for a celebration and had a wonderful time. The owner was so friendly and welcoming with us. The vibes were great and the food amazing. I definitely recommend ! The place is pretty spacious for a pretty big party (We were twelve for reference) and everyone was satisfied ☺️
Amazing atmosphere , food is succulent and customer service was beyond my expectations. Staff was very professional and nice, looking forward to go back and try the fish there.
The owners were very accommodating for a special event all staff were friendly and helpful! We had a great experience enjoying the various African dishes, thank you!
NGANDA AFRICAN STREET FOOD||936 GERRARD.query: NGANDA AFRICAN STREET FOOD 936 GERRARD ST E Toronto

HAKKA KHAZANA RESTAURANT||2003 AVENUE RD.matchedAddress: 2003 Avenue Rd, North York, ON M5M 4A4, Canada
reviews:
The food did not seem too fresh.
The chicken pakoras had tough chicken on the inside.
The hot & sour soup was spicy but lacked vegetables.
The butter chicken was nothing special.
The chili beef was not spicy but thick with gelatin.
Lack of proper table service.
Not a place to waste your time at.

I’ve always loved coming here—the food is simply amazing. Their authentic Hakka Chinese flavors are spot on, and the portions are generous enough for two people, especially the noodles. Don’t miss the veg Manchurian—it’s absolutely delicious! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ for the overall experience. They were closed for 6 months and we were eagerly waiting for them to reopen, so it felt great to finally visit again

Enjoyed our time here with great food and drinks. This place really took us back to India. A must recommended place if you’re craving proper Indian Chinese food. Their tandoori momos is a must try.

Matka kulfi is also an amazing choice for dessert.
Sujan here served us very well, had a genuine connection and conversation with him. Nice guy, even great server! Will definitely come back with a bigger gang! ❤️

FAHMEE BAKERY||31 TAPSCOTT RD, #58B M1B.matchedAddress: 31 Tapscott Rd Unit 58B, Scarborough, ON M1B 4Y7, Canada
reviews:
It's hard to ignore all the hype surrounding Fahmee Bakery and the story of what got them to this point, so when I happened to be at Scarborough's Malvern Mall, I had to stop in to try them for myself.

First impressions: the store is bright, spacious, and clean, with well stocked displays, and a friendly young lady providing good service.

I tried the Curry Goat Patty and their Apple Fritter. Both looked good but how did they taste?

The patty had a good looking crust, with squared off corners, rather than the traditional half-moon shape. It had a decent amount of filling. Not bad for $3.25.

With so many competitors in the Jamaican food scene, it's an uphill battle to stand out nowadays - even if you have the rights to a name that is beloved by the local community AND a strong social media presence.

There is potential here, but to me, it's clear they are still working things out: a true "2" at the moment, but I'm rounding up to 4 to support local businesses.

Regular price for a dozen patties is $28 but they had a promo where it's $24. That is still a smidge more pricey than some others but worth a shot, so off we went to try it!

As it currently is, Fahmees is a tale of 5 items.

I recently visited this location and tried their Jamaican Patty and compared to other places where I have tried Jamaican Patty it was quite different here in terms of texture and flavour but sadly I did not like their Jamaican Patty at all and would not recommend it to anybody. They do have a lot of other baked goods which I did not try and my review is solely based on Jamaican Patty.

This was a mistake. Going in for a quick bite to eat, I wanted to stop by for lunch and saw this place.

The location is clean but also was a bit disorganized. The service was also manageable and didn't rush me which I did appreciate. But man the food.

The patty had no seasoning and flavor, no heat, a rubbery bite, a very dry filling. It was like eating a shoe. Even the dough tasted like regret and filled me with the experience of filling out a tax form.

The sandwich was also just a sad excuse of a jerk chicken. It was overly salty and almost sour?! The bun was also a very dry husk and the v

Thank you for supporting our running event!

A huge thank you to Fahmee Bakery for supporting our recent running event. We hosted a 1 love run event in support of those effected by the hurricane in Jamaica.

They prepared fresh, delicious patties for our morning runners, and everyone was hyped. You can tell the flavor, freshness, and quality had extra love.

On top of that, they generously provided additional pastries, which were a hit as well. Their kindness and support truly elevated our event.

Highly recommend this patty shop for great food and even better community spirit. Thank you again

reviews:
I had such a fantastic experience at Oodles Wok! As soon as I entered, the aromas of the food were absolutely amazing.

The food itself was incredibly flavourful and so yummy. Every bite was packed with taste, and everything was cooked perfectly.

The customer service was also outstanding. The staff were friendly, welcoming, and made the whole experience even better.

Highly recommend this place if you’re craving delicious Chinese food with great service. I’ll definitely be coming back!

Their food was good but not such that you can eat quite often.   Almost all of their items are a little sweet and a lot spicy, so if someone is diabetic, this is not good for the person.
Customer service was great.   They listed you and try best to serve your the food according to their standards.
They have a limited sitting arrangement at the upper floor which is just an average sitting arrangement.

Zero value for money as portions are very small….and every single gravy teates the same. We were the only people in the restaurant, it was a week day, no rush time at all, still took them 35 minutes to make the food. Noodle to gravy/seasoning ratio was very out, and altogether doesnt taste good. This place is only good to try once.

I got the Regular with Spicy Fries, Vegetable Rice, Chilli Chicken and Salt and Pepper Chicken. So good! I would definitely recommend the chili fries. The vegetables dumplings were decent too! The lady at the counter was super helpful and gave good advice.

Ordered two “large” items through Uber Eats using a BOGO promo. I honestly can’t believe these would have cost $45 for just two dishes without the promotion. The portion sizes were shockingly small for a “large.”

If this is what Oodles considers large, Thai Express portions are far more generous by comparison.

As for the food itself, it was overly salty and drenched in sauce, which overwhelmed the flavors. Nothing really stood out or felt memorable.

We were curious to try it, and now we know, unfortunately, not something we’d order again.

Service was good, inside resto was modern and nice.

A great spot for affordable, comforting Chinese clay pot dishes in downtown Toronto.

We ordered:

✅Crispy Fried Eggplant – very well executed, crispy outside and tender inside, lightly sweet and tangy, not oily.

✅Spicy Clay Pot Clam Vermicelli – generous portion of clams, vermicelli soaked up the broth well. Flavorful without being too heavy or greasy.

Portions were satisfying, prices were reasonable (a

A Warm & Flavorful Gem in Chinatown – Don't Miss It!

福顺小馆 Fushun Stone Pot is quickly becoming a must-visit spot in Chinatown, and for good reason! There’s nothing more comforting during the colder months than one of their steaming hot stone pots, served fresh and packed with flavor.

Each dish is made to order, so you can taste the care and quality in every bite. The portions are incredibly generous—you’ll definitely get your money’s worth. From sizzling rice dishes to richly simmered stews, everything we tried was delicious and deeply satisfying.

A small tip: this place is gaining populari

reviews: The servers are very friendly! The food is tasty and looks great. The self-service is very convenient, and the place is big, with lots of spots to choose from where to sit. I really don’t understand the hype. I was excited to finally go as I love smash burgers, but the burger was tiny and just okay. The s’mores dessert my sister got was also just okay. Also not sure how to rate “service” when you order yourself and pick up your meal. The place is cute, but not worth it. Plenty of non-chain smashburger places in Toronto (eg Jabs on St Clair west), where you’ll get a better burger and value for money.

I recently visited Shake Shack and tried the Avocado Bacon Chicken Burger along with the Sticky Toffee Pudding Shake — both were absolutely amazing! The place was clean, spacious, and very well organized. I really liked how they’ve set up self-order monitors, which help reduce the line — you just take a tracker, and it vibrates when your order is ready.

A special thanks to Martina who helped me while placing my order — I was a bit confused, but she guided me kindly and made the experience even better. Definitely a place I’d recommend visiting! 🍔🥤

Exciting to see Shake Shack in Eglinton! Friendly staff and plenty of seating.
Staff were cleaning trays and even offered a soda refill, although the second refill didn’t taste quite the same as the original.
Not sure we’ll come often, as the price of the burgers didn’t quite match how filling they were for us.
We also mentioned a concern about flies to the staff — hopefully they can create a better environment.

And finally, the Eglinton Shake Shack branch has opened.
The store is beautiful. Its interior has been completely renovated: those who knew the previous establishment will notice that there are no longer any partitions in the dining area.

At the entrance, there's a menu listing the restaurant's menu, which helps you understand your options.

Stumbled upon this gem while Christmas Shopping and I am so glad that I did!

Tangssant Viennoiserie is a great meeting place and hang out to get some great coffee, matcha and delicious out-of-this-world pastries!

The pastries are filled with delicious fruity cream that is both exquisite and delectable!

I just love their Matcha Lattes! Whether hot or over ice it's all delicious and good.

The customer service is  also amazing!

Nestled in the heart of the Downtown Core not too far from the Eaton Centre and Dundas Station.

This is by far one of the best croissants and pastries I’ve ever had. Everything is made fresh onsite with best ingredients. Even on a snowy day there was a steady stream of customers and the workers were so busy making everything fresh working so hard behind the scenes. Love the open concept kitchen you can see where the magic happens. So not only is the pastries worth it. The service is also amazing.  This is a great place.

Absolutely love this café! Crispy, buttery, and freshly baked croissants!  My daughter loved it so much she even ate every little crumb left on the plate.The environment is cozy, clean, and very family-friendly. Highly recommended!

I walk past this bakery every day and the smell is always amazing, but I never had the chance to try it, until today. Absolutely delicious! Highly recommend the hojicha latte and the butter croissant.

I've been hearing a lot of great reviews about this spot and went to check them out. Pastries are gorgeous, well-made, and they have so many unique options. I picked up a few items and really enjoyed them! Loved how flaky the croissants were (but wished it was more buttery). I'm curious about some of their other pastries so would definitely go back if I'm in the area. The space is large but they only have a few seating spots and they fill up quick - hopefully they get some more small tables! Bonus points for super friendly and welcoming staff.

I tried the original Jaffa Cakes, strawberry Milka, and pistachio-filled Ülker chocolate, and they were really good. You’ll also find lots of KitKat and Dairy Milk varieties, along with familiar favorites like Aero and Reese’s, plus flavours you normally don’t see

We ordered Chicken Biryani, Fish Fry, Chicken 65, and Country Chicken Curry. Unfortunately, none of these dishes came anywhere close to the actual taste Vijayawada is known for.

reviews: After the sad loss of the original good luck restaurant it was nice to see a fresh start to this location. Food was very good, atmosphere and service was amazing. Clean and comfy environment. Food was delicious, enjoyed the hakka noodles and chilli chicken. Great place when craving indian and hakka.

We had an amazing experience at Bistro Special! The food was absolutely delicious with authentic taste and perfectly balanced flavors. The warm ambiance made the evening even more enjoyable. A special thanks to our server, Nancy, for her excellent service and for making us feel so comfortable. Highly recommended!
Food was great, customer service friendly.. 10/10 will definitely visit again!

We visited this restaurant to celebrate my husband’s birthday, and it turned out to be a wonderful experience. Our server, Richi, was incredibly sweet, attentive, and made the evening feel extra special.

We absolutely loved their Manchurian soup and mixed chowmein, truly the stars of the meal! The fried rice and chilli beef were delicious as well, perfectly seasoned and satisfying.

Overall, the service, food, and ambiance made our celebration memorable. Highly recommended! 🍜✨

Very nice taste & well deserved quantity in this price range. Perfect for chinese craving people. Thank you so much Devendra for making these delicious food and Nancy for top-notch service. Definitely see you guys next time.
